{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Officer",
  "description": "Equinoxx Power Engineering Limited -&nbsp;Perkins Generator, FG wilson UK, Power Transformer has given Equinoxx Power Engineering as an engineering support and sales company which specialty in Engineering Services, Sales &amp; Servicing of Generators,Heavy duty equipment,Power systems, Inverter, Transformers sales and installations, Safety, Cooling and Air conditional &amp; Industrial Equipment, and General Contract.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We&#39;re seeking a creative and driven Marketing Officer to develop and implement marketing strategies, manage campaigns, and drive brand awareness for our growing business.


Responsibilities
Marketing Strategy:


	Develop and execute marketing plans to achieve business goals
	Identify target audience, market trends, and competitor analysis


Campaign Management:


	Create and execute campaigns across digital, social, and traditional channels
	Manage budgets, timelines, and campaign performance


Brand Development:


	Support brand positioning and messaging consistency
	Collaborate with teams on brand identity and promotions


Content and Social Media:


	Create engaging content for social media and marketing channels
	Manage social media presence and community engagement


Analysis and Reporting:


	Track campaign performance and ROI
	Provide insights and recommendations for improving.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 / month

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;enquinoxxpowerengineeringltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketing Officer Job at Equinoxx Power Engineering Limited




        
    

        
        Equinoxx Power Engineering Limited - Perkins Generator, FG wilson UK, Power Transformer has given Equinoxx Power Engineering as an engineering support and sales company which specialty in Engineering Services, Sales & Servicing of Generators,Heavy duty equipment,Power systems, Inverter, Transformers sales and installations, Safety, Cooling and Air conditional & Industrial Equipment, and General Contract.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We're seeking a creative and driven Marketing Officer to develop and implement marketing strategies, manage campaigns, and drive brand awareness for our growing business.


Responsibilities
Marketing Strategy:


	Develop and execute marketing plans to achieve business goals
	Identify target audience, market trends, and competitor analysis


Campaign Management:


	Create and execute campaigns across digital, social, and traditional channels
	Manage budgets, timelines, and campaign performance


Brand Development:


	Support brand positioning and messaging consistency
	Collaborate with teams on brand identity and promotions


Content and Social Media:


	Create engaging content for social media and marketing channels
	Manage social media presence and community engagement


Analysis and Reporting:


	Track campaign performance and ROI
	Provide insights and recommendations for improving.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 / month

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Manager",
  "description": "Castville Solutions - Our client, a leading player in the healthcare sector, is seeking a Procurement Manager to oversee and manage the sourcing, purchasing, and supply chain operations in the capacity below:

Job Position: Procurement Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The ideal candidate will ensure cost efficiency, quality assurance, and timely delivery of goods and services to support smooth business operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with company goals.
	Source and negotiate with vendors and suppliers to secure favorable terms.
	Maintain and update records of purchases, pricing, and other important data.
	Monitor supplier performance and ensure consistent product quality.
	Collaborate with departments to forecast demand and manage inventory levels.
	Ensure compliance with procurement policies and ethical standards.
	Prepare procurement reports and present analyses to management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 &ndash; 5 years of experience in procurement or supply chain management.
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills.
	Excellent analytical, communication, and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and procurement software is an added advantage.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / month",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-14",

Procurement Manager Job at Castville Solutions




        
    

        
        Castville Solutions - Our client, a leading player in the healthcare sector, is seeking a Procurement Manager to oversee and manage the sourcing, purchasing, and supply chain operations in the capacity below:

Job Position: Procurement Manager
Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The ideal candidate will ensure cost efficiency, quality assurance, and timely delivery of goods and services to support smooth business operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with company goals.
	Source and negotiate with vendors and suppliers to secure favorable terms.
	Maintain and update records of purchases, pricing, and other important data.
	Monitor supplier performance and ensure consistent product quality.
	Collaborate with departments to forecast demand and manage inventory levels.
	Ensure compliance with procurement policies and ethical standards.
	Prepare procurement reports and present analyses to management.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 – 5 years of experience in procurement or supply chain management.
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills.
	Excellent analytical, communication, and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and procurement software is an added advantage.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / month    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hotel Supervisor",
  "description": "Everland Hotel &amp; Suites provides affordable accomodation to all and sundry. It is located in a serene environment in Opic. We pride ourself in providing exceptional services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Supervisor
Job Location:&nbsp;Opic, Ogun and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Supervise hotel staff and coordinate daily activities
	Ensure high standards of cleanliness, safety, and customer service
	Handle guest inquiries, complaints, and special requests professionally
	Monitor staff performance and provide guidance where needed
	Assist with scheduling and shift management
	Ensure compliance with hotel policies and procedures
	Support management in achieving operational goals.


Requirements


	Proven experience in a supervisory role within the hospitality industry
	Candidate should reside within Opic, Mowe, Ibafo, Berger axis
	Strong leadership and problem-solving skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks
	Good organizational skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Hotel Supervisor Job at Everland Hotel & Suites




        
    

        
        Everland Hotel & Suites provides affordable accomodation to all and sundry. It is located in a serene environment in Opic. We pride ourself in providing exceptional services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Supervisor
Job Location: Opic, Ogun and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Supervise hotel staff and coordinate daily activities
	Ensure high standards of cleanliness, safety, and customer service
	Handle guest inquiries, complaints, and special requests professionally
	Monitor staff performance and provide guidance where needed
	Assist with scheduling and shift management
	Ensure compliance with hotel policies and procedures
	Support management in achieving operational goals.


Requirements


	Proven experience in a supervisory role within the hospitality industry
	Candidate should reside within Opic, Mowe, Ibafo, Berger axis
	Strong leadership and problem-solving skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks
	Good organizational skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer / Technician",
  "description": "MEL HR Services is a human resource company based in Nigeria that delivers HR solutions to businesses across all industries. We specialize in labor law advisory, virtual recruitment, on-boarding, online payroll processing, and training all managed, throough smart technology and exprienced HR consultants.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position : Electrical Engineer / Technician

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a qualified Power Plant Monitoring Technician with an Electrical Engineering background to support the monitoring and operational oversight of power generation equipment.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for observing plant performance, monitoring electrical parameters, identifying operational abnormalities, and ensuring the efficient and safe operation of the power plant.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor power plant operations including generators, transformers, switchgear, and auxiliary systems.
	Track and record key electrical parameters such as voltage, current, frequency, load, and power output.
	Observe control systems and plant instrumentation to ensure stable and efficient operation.
	Identify abnormal operating conditions and promptly report them to the operations or engineering team.
	Maintain accurate operational logs, daily reports, and incident records.
	Assist with routine inspections of electrical equipment and plant infrastructure.
	Support troubleshooting activities during operational disturbances or equipment faults.
	Ensure compliance with plant safety procedures and operational protocols.
	Coordinate with plant operators, engineers, and maintenance teams to ensure smooth operations.
	Assist during plant start-up, shutdown, and maintenance activities as required.


Qualifications


	Diploma or Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
	Minimum of 1&ndash;3 years of experience in power generation, electrical systems monitoring, or industrial plant operations.
	Familiarity with power plant equipment, electrical distribution systems, and control systems.
	Basic understanding of SCADA systems and power plant instrumentation is an advantage.
	Strong attention to detail and ability to monitor multiple parameters simultaneously.
	Good reporting and communication skills.


Key Skills:


	Electrical systems monitoring
	Equipment inspection and troubleshooting support
	Operational data recording and reporting
	Safety and compliance awareness
	Basic power plant operations knowledge


Working Conditions:


	May involve shift work including nights, weekends, and holidays.
	Work may be conducted in control rooms, plant floors, and outdoor environments.
	Compliance with all plant safety and operational procedures is mandatory.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@mel-ng.com&nbsp;using &quot;Project Support Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Electrical Engineer / Technician Job at MEL HR Services




        
    

        
        MEL HR Services is a human resource company based in Nigeria that delivers HR solutions to businesses across all industries. We specialize in labor law advisory, virtual recruitment, on-boarding, online payroll processing, and training all managed, throough smart technology and exprienced HR consultants.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position : Electrical Engineer / Technician

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a qualified Power Plant Monitoring Technician with an Electrical Engineering background to support the monitoring and operational oversight of power generation equipment.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for observing plant performance, monitoring electrical parameters, identifying operational abnormalities, and ensuring the efficient and safe operation of the power plant.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor power plant operations including generators, transformers, switchgear, and auxiliary systems.
	Track and record key electrical parameters such as voltage, current, frequency, load, and power output.
	Observe control systems and plant instrumentation to ensure stable and efficient operation.
	Identify abnormal operating conditions and promptly report them to the operations or engineering team.
	Maintain accurate operational logs, daily reports, and incident records.
	Assist with routine inspections of electrical equipment and plant infrastructure.
	Support troubleshooting activities during operational disturbances or equipment faults.
	Ensure compliance with plant safety procedures and operational protocols.
	Coordinate with plant operators, engineers, and maintenance teams to ensure smooth operations.
	Assist during plant start-up, shutdown, and maintenance activities as required.


Qualifications


	Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
	Minimum of 1–3 years of experience in power generation, electrical systems monitoring, or industrial plant operations.
	Familiarity with power plant equipment, electrical distribution systems, and control systems.
	Basic understanding of SCADA systems and power plant instrumentation is an advantage.
	Strong attention to detail and ability to monitor multiple parameters simultaneously.
	Good reporting and communication skills.


Key Skills:


	Electrical systems monitoring
	Equipment inspection and troubleshooting support
	Operational data recording and reporting
	Safety and compliance awareness
	Basic power plant operations knowledge


Working Conditions:


	May involve shift work including nights, weekends, and holidays.
	Work may be conducted in control rooms, plant floors, and outdoor environments.
	Compliance with all plant safety and operational procedures is mandatory.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Project Support Officer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos

Job Summary


	As the Customer Service Representative, you will be responsible for managing customer interactions, attending to service inquiries, and ensuring a seamless client experience for customers seeking leather restoration services.


Responsibilities


	Respond to customer inquiries and service requests via WhatsApp and other communication channels
	Call customers to provide service updates, confirmations, and follow-ups
	Prepare and send invoices, service reports, and job updates to customers
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, orders, and service requests
	Ensure timely and professional communication to deliver a high-quality customer experience


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Customer Service, or related field
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in customer service, client support, or front desk roles
	Strong communication skills with the ability to manage customer interactions professionally
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools and WhatsApp Business communication
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail in handling invoices and reports.


Salary
NGN 180,000 &ndash; NGN200,000 Monthly.",

Customer Service Representative Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Leather Restoration Services sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Customer Service Representative, you will be responsible for managing customer interactions, attending to service inquiries, and ensuring a seamless client experience for customers seeking leather restoration services.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Respond to customer inquiries and service requests via WhatsApp and other communication channels
	Call customers to provide service updates, confirmations, and follow-ups
	Prepare and send invoices, service reports, and job updates to customers
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, orders, and service requests
	Ensure timely and professional communication to deliver a high-quality customer experience


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Customer Service, or related field
	2–4 years of experience in customer service, client support, or front desk roles
	Strong communication skills with the ability to manage customer interactions professionally
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools and WhatsApp Business communication
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail in handling invoices and reports.


Salary
NGN 180,000 – NGN200,000 Monthly.
